summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new wine detail pages feature. All 11 core features tested successfully including wine card navigation, individual wine pages, content sections, prev/next navigation, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Wine cards on homepage link correctly to individual wine pages (/wines/[slug])
Shiraz page loads at /wines/shiraz with correct content (2022 vintage, tagline, tasting notes)
Cabernet Sauvignon page loads at /wines/cabernet-sauvignon with correct content (2021 vintage)
Rosé page loads at /wines/rose with correct content (2024 vintage, fresh tagline)
Chardonnay page loads at /wines/chardonnay with correct content (2023 vintage)
Merlot page loads at /wines/merlot with correct content (2022 vintage)
Back to Collection link works correctly from all wine pages
Previous/Next wine navigation works correctly between wine pages
Tasting notes section displays correctly on all wine pages with character profiles
Food pairings section displays correctly with appropriate pairing suggestions
Technical details section displays correctly (alcohol %, serving temp, cellaring potential)
Age verification works correctly for direct wine page URLs
Mobile responsiveness works correctly for wine detail pages
All wine pages have unique content with correct years and taglines
Direct URL access works for all wine pages
